message:
test(proptest): add 25 property-based tests for mission_events

Comprehensive proptest coverage for MissionEventLog and event taxonomy:
- Phase mapping: kind→phase correctness for Plan/Safety/Dispatch phases (3)
- Log capacity: bounded capacity, eviction accounting, FIFO order (5)
- Sequence numbers: monotonic, 1-based start (2)
- Disabled log: returns None, stores nothing (1)
- Filtering: by phase, by kind, by cycle correctness (3)
- Summary: retained count, phase/kind count sums (3)
- drain_matching: correct removal and remaining (1)
- Builder: phase derivation, detail methods (str/u64/bool) (2)
- Serde roundtrip: event kind, phase, log config, full event log (4)
- CycleEventEmitter: context binding to all emitted events (1)

All 25 pass, zero clippy warnings (subprocess-bridge feature).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
